headline: History says this is the critical question for the S&P 500 over the next few days
summary: Investing.com -- The latest geopolitical situation and the resulting surge in oil prices have revived fears of a sustained risk-off move, but Deutsche Bank says history shows the equity outlook will depend on whether the current shock develops into something more severe.

content.title: History says this is the critical question for the S&P 500 over the next few days
content.summary: Investing.com -- The latest geopolitical situation and the resulting surge in oil prices have revived fears of a sustained risk-off move, but Deutsche Bank says history shows the equity outlook will depend on whether the current shock develops into something more severe.
